item.title: The Texas Primaries Just Ended A Bunch of Jerry Springer Episodes

item.title: For Media, The Only Good Christian Is A Fake One Like James Talarico
item.description: When Democrats conceal radical left-wing ideology in Christian language, media celebrate it as a savvy communications strategy and describe it as 'hea...

item.title: Trump Says He’ll Do ‘Right Thing’ In Iran No Matter The Polls. Let’s See The Same Approach To Deportations
item.description: The mass deportation of illegal immigrants is every bit as righteous and 'the right thing' to do as Trump claims bombing Iran is.

item.title: SCOTUS Rules That Courts Should Defer To Immigration Judges On Asylum Cases

item.title: ‘We Are Just Getting Started’: Hegseth Signals Prolonged U.S. Commitment In Iran
